package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessRowsScanIntoMapPerRow() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_database_access_rows_scan_into_map_per_row"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Database access. Flag row scans into map[string]any where typed structs or column slices would reduce allocation."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
